tests.description: [SKIPPED — race+interrupts not yet supported, punted with race-interrupt] Race where each branch contains a fork that interrupts — should batch all interrupts and produce the result of one of the race branches

evaluationCriteria.judgePrompt: The output should be an array of 2 strings. Each looks like 'ok a-1', 'ok a-2', 'ok b-1', or 'ok b-2'. Both strings in the array share the same prefix letter (either both 'a' or both 'b').
